root_text.sn45.33:1.2: “Yesaṁ kesañci, bhikkhave, ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo viraddho, viraddho tesaṁ ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo sammā dukkhakkhayagāmī.
root_text.sn45.33:1.3: Yesaṁ kesañci, bhikkhave, ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo āraddho, āraddho tesaṁ ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo sammā dukkhakkhayagāmī.
root_text.sn45.33:1.4: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo?
root_text.sn45.33:1.6: Yesaṁ kesañci, bhikkhave, ayaṁ ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo viraddho, viraddho tesaṁ ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo sammā dukkhakkhayagāmī.
root_text.sn45.33:1.7: Yesaṁ kesañci, bhikkhave, ayaṁ ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo āraddho, āraddho tesaṁ ariyo aṭṭhaṅgiko maggo sammā dukkhakkhayagāmī”ti.

translation_text.sn45.33:1.2: “Mendicants, whoever has missed out on the noble eightfold path has missed out on the noble path to the complete ending of suffering.
translation_text.sn45.33:1.3: Whoever has undertaken the noble eightfold path has undertaken the noble path to the complete ending of suffering.
translation_text.sn45.33:1.4: And what is the noble eightfold path?
translation_text.sn45.33:1.5: It is right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, and right immersion.
translation_text.sn45.33:1.6: Whoever has missed out on the noble eightfold path has missed out on the noble path to the complete ending of suffering.
translation_text.sn45.33:1.7: Whoever has undertaken the noble eightfold path has undertaken the noble path to the complete ending of suffering.”

reference_text.sn45.33:1.1: cck19.25, dr19.27, ms14S5_121, msdiv33, pts-vp-pli5.24, sya19.29
